items.name: auth-provider
items.title: Solid Auth Provider
items.description: Solid provider wrapper for Better Auth UI using Solid Query and the Solid package surface.

items.name: additional-field
items.title: Solid Additional Field
items.description: Additional field renderer used by Solid sign-up and profile surfaces.

items.title: Solid Sign In
items.description: Solid sign-in surface with email/password, username, and provider button support.

items.title: Solid Sign Up
items.description: Solid sign-up component using the Solid email sign-up mutation options.

items.name: magic-link
items.title: Solid Magic Link
items.description: Solid/Zaidan passwordless magic-link sign-in view, toggle button, and UI plugin factory.

items.name: username
items.title: Solid Username
items.description: Solid username UI plugin, sign-in form, and username availability field.

items.name: passkey
items.title: Solid Passkey
items.description: Solid passkey sign-in button and passkey management cards.

items.name: api-key
items.title: Solid API Keys
items.description: Solid API key management cards and dialogs.

items.name: forgot-password
items.title: Solid Forgot Password
items.description: Solid forgot-password component using the Solid password reset mutation options.

items.name: reset-password
items.title: Solid Reset Password
items.description: Solid reset-password component using the Solid password reset mutation options.

items.name: sign-out
items.title: Solid Sign Out
items.description: Solid sign-out component that ends the session and returns to sign in.

items.name: auth
items.title: Solid Auth
items.description: Solid auth router surface that selects the active auth view.

items.name: user-button
items.title: Solid User Button
items.description: Solid user menu trigger with account, settings, plugin, and auth links.

items.name: user-avatar
items.title: Solid User Avatar
items.description: Solid user avatar primitive for auth account surfaces.

items.name: user-view
items.title: Solid User View
items.description: Solid user identity row used by account menus and profile surfaces.

items.name: user-profile
items.title: Solid User Profile
items.description: Solid user profile card for account settings.

items.name: account-settings
items.title: Solid Account Settings
items.description: Solid account settings with profile, email, and plugin account cards.

items.name: security-settings
items.title: Solid Security Settings
items.description: Solid security settings tabs for sessions, linked accounts, passkeys, and API keys.

items.name: settings
items.title: Solid Settings
items.description: Solid settings shell combining account and security sections.

items.name: active-sessions
items.title: Solid Active Sessions
items.description: Solid active sessions management card.

items.name: linked-accounts
items.title: Solid Linked Accounts
items.description: Solid linked accounts management card.

items.name: change-password
items.title: Solid Change Password
items.description: Solid change-password settings card.

items.name: change-email
items.title: Solid Change Email
items.description: Solid change-email settings card.

items.name: email-verification-email
items.title: Solid Email Verification Email
items.description: Solid email template component that sends email verification links to users.

items.name: magic-link-email
items.title: Solid Magic Link Email
items.description: Solid email template component that sends magic link authentication emails for passwordless sign-in.

items.name: reset-password-email
items.title: Solid Reset Password Email
items.description: Solid email template component that sends password reset links to users.

items.name: password-changed-email
items.title: Solid Password Changed Email
items.description: Solid email template component that notifies users when their password has been changed.

items.name: email-changed-email
items.title: Solid Email Changed Email
items.description: Solid email template component that notifies users when their email address has been changed.

items.name: otp-email
items.title: Solid OTP Email
items.description: Solid email template component that sends one-time password (OTP) verification codes to users.

items.name: new-device-email
items.title: Solid New Device Email
items.description: Solid email template component that notifies users when a new device signs in to their account.

items.name: organization-invitation-email
items.title: Solid Organization Invitation Email
items.description: Solid email template component that invites a user to join an organization.

items.name: organization
items.title: Solid Organization
items.description: Solid organization setup with settings tab, organization switcher, and slug route shell.

items.title: Solid Theme
